name: soul-retrieval
description: Sandra Ingerman's guide to shamanic soul retrieval — understanding soul loss, journeying to recover lost parts, negotiating return, and integrating wholeness after trauma.
useCase: Healing soul loss from trauma, shamanic journeying, retrieving fragmented self-parts, integrating returned essence, addressing spiritual dimensions of depression and emptiness.
knownRisks: Soul retrieval is a spiritual practice, not a substitute for medical or psychological treatment
The case studies are composites and may not reflect any specific individual's experience
Shamanic journeying requires trained guidance — this book alone is not sufficient to become a practitioner
Some may find the concepts of soul loss and nonordinary reality difficult to accept from a rational perspective
